programme.desc: A 19-year-old is discovered in Canada; after becoming "Playmate of the Year," her husband sees dollar signs, but as her star rises, she's drawn to another man; afraid of losing his meal ticket, her husband shoots them in their home.

programme.title: Lethally Blonde
programme.desc: An aspiring model, Kimberly Pandelios, accepts an offer to pose in lingerie for a mysterious photographer, then disappears; years later, a young woman contacts the police when she begins to suspect that her boyfriend may have been the killer.

programme.title: Lethally Blonde
programme.desc: A missing person's report sends investigators on a desperate search through the seedy underbelly of the Floribama panhandle; all roads lead to a once sought-after porn star, whose fate is revealed when an informant comes forward to unearth the truth.

programme.title: Lethally Blonde
programme.desc: When detectives respond to a 911 call from a lavish Miami apartment, they uncover a bloody scene with a popular social media influencer at the center; as they piece events together, soon it gets clear that a lot is going on behind closed doors.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to the Kingdom of Kush to dive the flooded pyramid tomb of a king; the murky water provides zero visibility, and the pyramid is at risk of collapse; the dive could unlock the mystery of a civilization that once conquered Egypt.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: The conclusion to Josh Gates' dive into a Kush king's flooded pyramid tomb; Josh scales a mountain to learn how the Kingdom of Kush conquered Egypt and braves the murky waters for one more dive to find the king's mummified remains.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Hot on the trail of a stolen fortune, Josh chases the treasure of the infamous Spanish pirate Amaro Pargo; an exhaustive hunt of Pargo's stomping grounds in the Canary Islands leads Josh beneath an active volcano to dive for the pirate's hoard.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh searches for a top-secret WWII seaplane that crashed into the Pacific; now, 70 years later, Josh joins a team scouring the ocean floor hundreds of feet below to find a lost aviation treasure -- the only XP5Y-1 still in existence.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh helps recover the richest stash of lost treasure in the Americas; deploying cutting-edge technology and an armada of boats, the team dives the Caribbean to bring coins and jewels from the legendary Spanish galleon Maravillas to the surface.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.desc: A massive seven-acre, snow-covered hoard pushes Matt to the brink; when it takes the team a full day just to unclog the driveway, Matt's deep in the red; to clear the stairs, they toss 500 pounds of trash and hunt for a lost gold nugget on the top floor.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: For the first time ever, two survivalists are forced to spend the first night of their 21-day challenge completely alone in Botswana's, Okavango Delta; raging storms, swarming mosquitoes, and starvation push them both to the brink.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.desc: Across the United States, unclaimed valuables lie buried within ordinary people's attics, basements and garages; Matt Paxton, travels around the country in search of rare, big-ticket items hidden in some of the most cluttered, filthy homes imaginable; his priority is to clean out the overloaded properties and sell his finds as quickly and for as much money as possible to secure the ultimate payday

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
